label: Portfolio KPIs
description: Open position count, total staked, unrealised P&L, and win rate across prediction markets.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Synchronous mock context; usePredictionsData() throws on missing provider, caught by WidgetErrorBoundary.

0.7.note: KPI strips show zero-values as correct empty representation; no separate empty state needed.

1.1.note: Reads openPositions, settledPositions, portfolioKpis via usePredictionsData() only.

1.4.note: No clientId on PredictionPosition; client narrowing deferred to schema change.

1.5.note: Strategy scope propagates through openPositions/settledPositions memos.

1.7.note: Mock data in lib/mocks/fixtures/ — future scope to move.

l1.notes: All L1 checks pass (1.4 partial — schema gap).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Applies: live ✓, paper ✓ (KPIs show simulated label on paper positions), batch ✓ (read-only KPI strip).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); isPaper tags positions with 'simulated' label.

3.5.note: Paper mode: KPI values reflect simulated positions tagged via isPaper memo.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 3.3/3.4 N/A for this read-only KPI strip; verify KPIs update when mode switches.

4.1.note: No buttons in this widget — pure display.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 4.8 — verify KPI tiles scroll correctly at small minH=1.

5.1.note: Portfolio summary widget for all prediction strategies: PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M, PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify KPIs reflect live strategy positions after simulated trades.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Sentiment colors delegated to KpiSummaryWidget via sentiment prop.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: metrics array is computed inline before return but not in a dep array.

8.1.note: No arbitrary font sizes in widget file.

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick. Human: keyboard walk.

l8.notes: Agent checks pass. Human: 8.5 resize at minW=4 minH=1.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI strip is a summary bar that spans full width; designed to sit above the grid and positions, not coupled to any specific widget.

relationships.notes: KPIs reflect scope-filtered openPositions and settledPositions from shared context.

dataContract.notes: Production: derived from position aggregation service. KPIs update on position changes.

gaps: Win rate denominator is settledPositions.length which may be small on first use
No historical P&L breakdown by venue
coverage.notes: All-up portfolio view; not broken down by strategy or venue.

knownIssues.description: Client-level filter not wired — PredictionPosition has no clientId field; full client narrowing deferred.

findings.description: pred-portfolio-kpis-widget.tsx — ~4 user-visible label strings not i18n-ready
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
